name: 🍝 White Sauce Pasta
original:
🧂 Ingredients

For pasta

300 g pasta (penne or spaghetti)
Water (for boiling)
1 tsp salt

For white sauce (béchamel)

2 tbsp butter
2 tbsp all-purpose flour (maida)
2 cups milk (500 ml)
1 tsp salt (adjust to taste)
½ tsp black pepper
½ tsp chili flakes (optional)
½ tsp oregano

Vegetables (optional but recommended)

1 small onion, sliced
1 capsicum, chopped
½ cup sweet corn
½ cup mushrooms (optional)

Extras

½ cup grated cheese (optional)
scaled:
🧂 Ingredients

For pasta

450 g pasta (penne or spaghetti)
Water (for boiling)
1 1/2 tsp salt

For white sauce (béchamel)

3 tbsp butter
3 tbsp all-purpose flour (maida)
3 cups milk (750 ml)
1 1/2 tsp salt (adjust to taste)
3/4 tsp black pepper
3/4 tsp chili flakes (optional)
3/4 tsp oregano

Vegetables (optional but recommended)

1 small onion, sliced
1 capsicum, chopped
3/4 cup sweet corn
3/4 cup mushrooms (optional)

Extras

3/4 cup grated cheese (optional)
tip: Use a larger pan or bowl when scaling up to keep cooking even and avoid spills.
